title: corybas himalaicus
intro: Corybas himalaicus, also known as Himalayan corybas or Himalayan club moss, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae, a group of small, evergreen, and scale-like plants. This plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Himalayan corybas include relief from coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate inflammation. In traditional herbal preparations, Corybas himalaicus is often used in decoctions or infusions to treat various health conditions, and it can also be dried and processed into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts for easier consumption.
